title: Fomohomo
description: Do you fear missing out? Want to catch Brighton’s newest rising queer comics? Luke Abbott and Craig Donaghy present FOMOHOMO Queer Comedy Club, a one hour mixed bill packed with laughs. MC'd by Miriam D'Angelo and featuring Luke Abbott, Craig Donaghy and Eva-Jade Andrews PLUS amazing new talent! Miss it and miss out! - Craig Donaghy - Brighton Komedia New Comedy Award Finalist 2026, So You Think You’re Funny Semi-Finalist 2025. Eva-Jade Andrews - Brighton Komedia New Comedy Award Semi-Finalist 2026, So You Think You’re Funny Semi-Finalist 2025.
